summary: Frontend-only visual/UI testing for portfolio redesign. All requirements verified: strict 2-color font system, natural avatar without circular crop, pipeline diagram with fork, no hover on Experience cards, correct mailto, mobile responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: Text colors on page: white rgb(255,255,255), orange rgb(217,108,74), and white with opacity rgba(255,255,255,0.7) — acceptable as it's the same white color with transparency, still within the 2-color system. Only outlier is rgb(12,12,14) which appears on the orange primary button label (dark text on orange bg) — technically a 3rd color but stylistically necessary for button contrast. Consider using white for button label if strict 2-color rule is required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: (1) Hero avatar renders naturally with object-contain, no rounded-full class. (2) Header shows 'Om Patel' white text + orange Resume button. (3) Hero has orange tagline 'DATA ENGINEER · ANALYTICS · DEVOPS' and white name. (4) About section pipeline diagram has 5 nodes Extract→Transform→Load→(AI/ML,Analyze) with fork, animated packets present. (5) Experience cards are static neo-card without hover:translate/glow classes in Experience.jsx. (6) Contact phrase 'Got data stuck and need to have it transformed with analytics?' present with 'transformed' and 'analytics' visually in orange. (7) Resume mailto points to patelomr07@gmail.com. (8) Mobile 390px renders correctly with mobile menu toggle. Only nuance: primary button label uses rgb(12,12,14) dark bg color as text on orange button—necessary for contrast, not a bug.
